name: Agent Governance Playbook
allowed_use_boundary: Use as external agent-continuation governance crosswalk evidence.
Do not treat as certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority.
claims: The playbook frames whether an agent should still be allowed to continue.
The playbook can be mapped to continuation, governance boundary, and evidence terms.
non_claims: The playbook does not prove transition admissibility.
A playbook release does not grant execution authority.
The wiki relationship record is not acceptance of equivalence.

transition_table_mapping.claims: agent continuation, continued allowance, governance playbook framing, release artifact
transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no admissibility proof, certification, endorsement, or execution authority
transition_table_mapping.actor_or_authority_model: external playbook posture; no StegVerse authority inherited
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: source plus crosswalk can reconstruct continuation relationship limits
transition_table_mapping.SPE_overlap: may inform continuation review, not standing determination
transition_table_mapping.StegVerse_ecosystem_overlap: Decision Continuity, Runtime Transition Governance, Governance Boundary
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: missing source, undefined mapping, or authority overclaim

fail_closed_conditions: any certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority claim appears
